description: The Mindmap module: nodes, edges, canvas, layouts, minimap, export—not general app settings unless clearly Mindmap-specific.
detection_hint: mindmap, mind map, node, edge, canvas, hierarchy, minimap, zoom, layout tree, radial, export png, mindmap module

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Mindmaps: use add_nodes with many entries (or nodes on create_mindmap) for large diagrams; parent_index links to earlier entries in the same batch. read_mindmap for structure. style_nodes with node_ids or subtree_of. apply_layout after edits. Prefer tools over prose when mutating diagrams.
